title: hartogia tenuis
intro: Hartogia tenuis, also known as Hartogia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa, with a rich history of traditional use in folk medicine. The medicinal properties of Hartogia tenuis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or extracts, and its health benefits include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive problems, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
